---
name: compliance-privacy
summary: |
  Compliance & Privacy skill: GDPR, data retention/erasure endpoints, consent
  flows, and AI Act considerations.
---

## Purpose
Provide checklists and templates to implement regulatory-compliant features
(e.g., GDPR erasure, data minimization, audit logs).

## When to use
- Implementing `/stats` deletion, `/stats` anonymisation, or data retention policies.
- Designing consent flows for analytics or model usage.

## Checklist
- Map personal data fields and retention windows.
- Provide right-to-erasure endpoint and test anonymisation.
- Maintain audit logs for administrative actions.
- Provide clear privacy docs and contact information.

## Commands
- Run privacy checklist in PR and include a small privacy section in release notes.

## Outputs
- GDPR endpoint templates, retention policy suggestions, consent UI copy.
